name: Yoyo's - The Hook
notes: Offshore in the wet season; early morning sessions are usually best during dry season trade winds.
description: Yoyo's - The Hook is a consistent right-hand reef break in West Sumbawa with long, powerful and rippable walls. It breaks into a defined deep channel, making entry and exit more predictable than nearby The Wedge. It works through all tides and is a reliable option when SW to W swell combines with NW to N wind.
hazards: powerful sections when the swell is bigger
